headline: Xylem Inc. (NYSE:XYL): A Dividend Growth Anchor for Passive Income Investors
summary: Xylem Inc. (XYL) offers a reliable 1.46% dividend with 9% annual growth, strong profitability, and low debt—ideal for steady passive income investors.
